headline: US Bans CBDCs Until 2030 Amid Housing Bill

article.title: US nears ban on CBDCs until 2030 as housing bill goes to Trump
article.summary: The House passed a housing bill with a central bank digital currency ban until 2030, meaning it now just needs US President Donald Trump’s sign-off.

article.title: Catholic leaders, US authorities challenge CLARITY Act over illicit activity
article.summary: “Regulatory certainty should not come at the expense of accountability, transparency, victim protection, or public safety,” the law enforcement associations said.

article.title: Temasek Unit, Oman Fund Join Vinpearl’s Private Credit Deal
article.summary: A unit of Singapore’s Temasek Holdings Pte. and Oman’s sovereign wealth fund are investing in a $255 million private credit financing for Vingroup JSC’s hospitality arm, underscoring continued appetite among state-backed investors in such opportunities in Asia.

headline: Euro Stocks Fall 2% Amid Heat Wave Disruption

article.title: Heat Wave Hits Europe, Causing Disruption
article.summary: Extreme weather will continue across northwest Europe through the weekend, testing temperature records, according to weather models and analysis from meteorologists. London is forecast to breach 35C on Wednesday. Bloomberg's Joe Wertz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Bitcoin Plunges 5% Amid Trump's Crypto Push
